perspectives.body: BREAKING: US President Donald Trump on Friday warned Taiwan against pushing for formal independence, after he discussed the flashpoint issue with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping in Beijing.

stories.headline: New Ebola outbreak confirmed in Congo's Ituri province with 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: BREAKING: Africa CDC reports Ebola outbreak in DR Congo; more than 200 suspected cases, 65 deaths

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: A new outbreak of the highly contagious Ebola virus has been confirmed in Congo’s eastern Ituri province, Africa’s top public health body said. There have been 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths recorded so far.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: A new Ebola outbreak in a remote province in Congo has caused 65 deaths and 246 suspected cases so far, Africa CDC says.

stories.headline: President Trump meets Xi Jinping in Beijing, agrees Iran cannot have nuclear weapon

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Every American should be proud of President Trump’s historic and consequential trip to China. Glad we finally have a leader who fights for American interests across the globe.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body:
You won’t hear this on Fox News:

California just released a balanced budget that wipes out the deficit this year AND next — while protecting health care and safety nets.

Meanwhile, Trump ADDED $2.4 TRILLION to the federal deficit with his “Big Beautiful Betrayal.”

Republicans ruin budgets.
Democrats balance them.

Adulting matters.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body:
Trump is winning BIG today…

China trip is going better than anyone could have imagined. China helping bring Iran War to an end. Buying American oil. Massive trade deals. Stocks roaring.

Chinese Army Band even played YMCA

Expect TDS doomers to have a psychotic breakdown

stories.headline: White House announces list of prominent business leaders joining President Trump on his state visit to China for the US-China summit.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Most Americans still think geopolitics is politicians giving speeches at podiums. That’s the old world. What President Trump is doing in Beijing right now is something entirely different: Using CORPORATE POWER as a geopolitical weapon. Look at the delegation he assembled for China: • Elon Musk - Tesla / SpaceX • Tim Cook - Apple ... MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! God bless President Trump! God bless America!

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: $NVDA  - TRUMP: CHINA HASN’T BOUGHT NVIDIA H200 CHIPS President Donald Trump said China has not purchased Nvidia’s H200 chips, despite U.S. approval for sales. He said China “chose not to” and is aiming to develop its own technology. Chip stocks fell after the summit ended without a major tech deal.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: President Donald Trump departed Beijing without any immediate sign that the US and China have resolved thorny challenges dogging their fractious relationship, but with a freshly stabilized relationship with Chinese leader Xi Jinping – for now.

stories.headline: Turkish company Kontrolmatik defaults on two lira bonds amid rare corporate debt default.
stories.body: Turkey’s Kontrolmatik defaulted on two separate lira bonds that matured on Friday, according to a statement by Turkey’s Central Securities Depository, marking a rare corporate debt default in the country’s local bond market

stories.headline: Reflection on the essential role of true friends in life.
stories.body: The most important thing in life is having true friends.

stories.headline: U.S. Attorney announces crackdown on parents of D.C. teen takeover participants
stories.body:
BREAKING: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro announces a major crackdown on parents who let their children take part in teen takeovers that have been causing chaos throughout Washington, D.C.

Pirro vows to prosecute parents who fail to supervise their children, threatening the adults with fines and even jail times.

"If the evidence shows the parent knew or should have known or permitted or failed to prevent participation, we're going to charge them."

"If you drop your kid off and you fail to supervise them, or you let them skip school to join the chaos, you are going to face fines, court ordered classes, and possible jail time"

stories.headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang samples Beijing noodles during China visit
stories.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was spotted trying some of Beijing’s delicacies. He was seen at No. 69 Fangzhuanchang Noodles, tucking into a bowl of “zhajiangmian” — a Beijing specialty that features noodles covered in a thick soybean-paste sauce mixed with vegetables and meat.

stories.headline: US suspects Iranian hackers breached gas station fuel monitoring systems
stories.body: US officials suspect Iranian hackers are behind a series of breaches of systems that monitor the amount of fuel in storage tanks serving gas stations in multiple states, according to multiple sources briefed on the activity.

stories.headline: Teenage Buddhist lama blesses crowds after moving from Minneapolis suburb
stories.body: The teenage Buddhist lama, Jalue Dorje, blesses thousands at a monastery in the Himalayan foothills. Just six months earlier and thousands of miles away, he was pulling all-nighters to play Madden NFL on his Xbox at his home in a Minneapolis suburb.

stories.headline: Newcastle accelerate talks for Monaco's Lamine Camara
stories.body:
🚨🔴⚪️🇸🇳 #PL |

 ❗️Newcastle have accelerated talks for AS Monaco midfielder Lamine Camara.

📍A meeting has already taken place between the player’s representatives and The Magpies in recent days. Kevin Danois is also in the short list.

👀 Liverpool are also informed on the situation and could soon step up their interest for the Senegal international.

💰Lamine Camara is currently valued around €50M

W @sebnonda & @laloumance

stories.headline: NASA's Psyche mission is approaching Mars for a trajectory adjustment.
stories.body:
Right now, NASA's #MissionToPsyche is approaching Mars. 

Current distance: 29,780 miles
Current speed relative to Mars: 10,340 mph

This simulated view, based on actual trajectory data, comes from our Eyes on the Solar System experience. 

Ride along: http://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/solar-system/#/sc_psyche
